---
title: "E2E Test Fixtures"
filters:
  - ../../_extensions/quarto-exercises/quarto-exercises.lua
quarto-exercises:
  instant: false
  reveal: false
  lock: false
  reset: true
  shuffle: false
  show-answers: false
---

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – SINGLE CHOICE
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ single-choice

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-basic-single"}
Who is the Ringbearer?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer}
Boromir
:::

::: {.answer}
Legolas
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – MULTIPLE CHOICE
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ multiple-choice

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-basic-multi"}
Which of the following are hobbits? Select all that apply.

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer correct=true}
Samwise Gamgee
:::

::: {.answer}
Legolas Greenleaf
:::

::: {.answer correct=true}
Meriadoc Brandybuck
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – PER-ANSWER FEEDBACK
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with per-answer feedback

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-with-feedback"}
Who guides the Fellowship?

::: {.answer correct=true key="gandalf"}
Gandalf

::: {.feedback}
Correct! Gandalf the Grey.
:::
:::

::: {.answer key="saruman"}
Saruman

::: {.feedback}
Wrong. Saruman betrayed them.
:::
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – HINT
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with hint

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-with-hint"}
What is the Elvish word for friend?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Mellon
:::

::: {.answer}
Ennyn
:::

::: {.hint}
Think of the door of Moria.
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – EXPLANATION (shows after correct)
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with explanation

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-with-explanation" explanation="correct"}
Who destroyed the One Ring?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo (via Gollum)
:::

::: {.answer}
Aragorn
:::

::: {.explanation}
Gollum bit off Frodo's finger and fell into the fire.
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – REVEAL (shows correct answers after check)
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with reveal

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-with-reveal" reveal=true}
Who is the king of Rohan?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Théoden
:::

::: {.answer}
Denethor
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – LOCK (disables inputs after correct)
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with lock

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-with-lock" lock=true}
What does Gimli carry?

::: {.answer correct=true}
An axe
:::

::: {.answer}
A bow
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MCQ – QUESTION BOX
     ======================================================== -->

## MCQ with question box

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-question-box" question-boxes="true"}
Where was the One Ring forged?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Mount Doom
:::

::: {.answer}
Isengard
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     INLINE BLANK – BASIC
     ======================================================== -->

## Inline blank

::: {.exercise data-testid="blank-exercise"}
The wizard is [`Gandalf`]{.blank answer="Gandalf"}.
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     INLINE BLANK – MULTI-ANSWER, CASE-INSENSITIVE
     ======================================================== -->

## Inline blank multi-answer

::: {.exercise data-testid="blank-multi-answer"}
The Ringbearer is [`Frodo`]{.blank answers="Frodo|Frodo Baggins" ignore-case=true}.
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     INLINE BLANK – REGEX
     ======================================================== -->

## Inline blank regex

::: {.exercise data-testid="blank-regex"}
Name the mountain: [`Mount Doom`]{.blank answer="^mount\s+doom$" match="regex" ignore-case=true}.
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     INLINE DROPDOWN (CHOOSE) – BASIC
     ======================================================== -->

## Inline choose

::: {.exercise data-testid="choose-exercise"}
The Ring was forged in [Mordor|Gondor|Rohan]{.choose answer="Mordor"}.
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     CODE CLOZE – STANDALONE
     ======================================================== -->

## Code cloze standalone

```{.code-cloze lang="r" data-testid="cloze-standalone"}
x <- {{choose answer="c" options="c|list|data.frame"}}(1, 2, 3)
total <- {{blank answer="sum"}}(x)
```

<!-- ========================================================
     CODE CLOZE – INSIDE EXERCISE
     ======================================================== -->

## Code cloze in exercise

::: {.exercise data-testid="cloze-exercise"}
```{.code-cloze lang="python"}
numbers = [1, 2, 3]
total = {{choose answer="sum" options="sum|max|min"}}(numbers)
print({{blank answer="total"}})
```
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     CHECK-BATCH
     ======================================================== -->

## Check-batch

::: {.check-batch data-testid="batch-container"}
::: {.exercise data-testid="batch-q1" points=2}
Which hobbit is Frodo's gardener?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Samwise Gamgee
:::

::: {.answer}
Meriadoc Brandybuck
:::
:::

::: {.exercise data-testid="batch-q2" points=1}
Complete: [`Samwise`]{.blank answer="Samwise"} Gamgee.
:::
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     MIXED EXERCISE (blanks + chooses together)
     ======================================================== -->

## Mixed exercise

::: {.exercise data-testid="mixed-exercise"}
The hobbits are saved at the Prancing Pony by [Aragorn|Boromir|Legolas]{.choose answer="Aragorn"},
also known as [`Strider`]{.blank answer="Strider"}.
:::

<!-- ========================================================
     EXERCISE – INSTANT MODE
     ======================================================== -->

## Instant mode exercise

::: {.exercise data-testid="mcq-instant" instant=true}
What does Elrond rule?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Rivendell
:::

::: {.answer}
Lothlórien
:::
:::
